dashboard.label: HTTP Attack Detection Dashboard
dashboard.description: Monitor brute-force attempts, SQL injection, sensitive file access, and web-shell execution.

search.query: index=main sourcetype="http_custom_logs" uri="/login.php" status=401 | stats count BY src | sort -count
index=main sourcetype="http_custom_logs" uri="/login.php" status=200 | table _time src method uri | sort _time
index=main sourcetype="http_custom_logs" | regex uri="(\bOR\b|\bUNION\b|\bSELECT\b|;|')" | table _time src uri status | sort _time
index=main sourcetype="http_custom_logs" | where like(uri, "%.zip") OR like(uri, "%.db") | table _time src uri status
index=main sourcetype="http_custom_logs" | where like(uri, "%upload.php") | table _time src method uri file status | sort _time
index=main sourcetype="http_custom_logs" | where like(uri, "%cmd=%") | table _time src uri status | sort _time

index=main sourcetype="http_custom_logs" | eval suspicious=if( status=401 OR like(uri,"%cmd=%") OR like(uri,"%.zip") OR like(uri,"%.db") OR match(uri,"(OR|UNION|SELECT|;)"), "yes","no") | where suspicious="yes" | timechart count BY src
